business.name: Moston Lane Plumbing Store
business.tagline: Your Local Plumbing Supplies, Ready Today

sample_reviews.author: Gary T
sample_reviews.text: Great little trade counter, always have what I need in stock. Staff know their stuff and serve you quickly — perfect for a busy plumber.

sample_reviews.author: Steve M
sample_reviews.text: Really helpful team, competitive prices and good stock levels. Much easier than driving across town to the big merchants.

sample_reviews.author: Amir K
sample_reviews.text: Solid local merchant. They had the obscure fitting I needed and saved me a wasted journey. Will definitely be back.

brand.usp: A trusted local plumbing merchant on Moston Lane, serving Manchester tradespeople and DIYers with a wide range of plumbing supplies, fittings and heating components — all available over the counter, same day.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Local Plumbing Merchant On Your Doorstep
brand.about_paragraph: We're Moston Lane Plumbing Store, your go-to trade counter right here in north Manchester. We stock everything from pipes and fittings to boiler spares and bathroom supplies, so whether you're a professional plumber on a tight schedule or a homeowner tackling a DIY job, we've got you covered. Pop in and see us — we're here to help you get the job done without the fuss.
